user.title: Connect to EdgePlane
user.description: Enter your EdgePlane server URL and your session token (copy from ~/.edgeplane/session.json or run `edgeplane auth login`).

agent.title: Agent configuration
agent.description: Choose a name for this HA agent and which domains to expose.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to EdgePlane. Check URL and token.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Provide a session token from edgeplane auth login.
